Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
T-MSIS TAF Annual Provider RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.3 105 

PRVDR_LAST_NAME 

LABEL: Provider Last Name — Individual 

DESCRIPTION: The last name of the provider when the provider is a person. 

SHORT NAME: PRVDR_LAST_NAME 

LONG NAME: PRVDR_LAST_NAME 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 45 

FILE(S): APR base 

SOURCE: T-MSIS annual provider TAF 

VALUES: Text string (e.g., ADAMS); or null/missing 

COMMENT: Derived from the same monthly
